CustomField.label: Category Form Qualified API Name
CustomField.description: Qualified API name of the Flow Tool Kit form used to add or edit the category records (rows) from the Universal Budget grid. Blank hides those actions for this budget.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Qualified API name (e.g. FlowToolKit__Category_Edit) of the form used to add and edit this budget's categories from the grid. Leave blank to hide those actions.
